title: neottia tianschanica
intro: Neottia tianschanica, also known as Tian Shan-Toad Lily, is a type of flowering plant in the orchid family (Orchidaceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Neottia tianschanica include its potential to aid in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as an anti-aging agent. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and stems can be used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
